creator: armin@frozen-zone.org
text:
According to http://code.google.com/p/pidgin-facebookchat/wiki/FAQ
json-glib > 0.7.6 is required - I tested pidgin-facebookchat locally and
it showed a weird behaivior - a compile warning was the hint that there
really was something wrong - after updating my json-glib (pr
ports/140097 ) it worked fine.
So I guess the update should be postponed until the new version of
json-glib is available in the ports.

Armin
